title: polycantha palustris
intro: Polycantha palustris, also known as Marsh Cotton Thistle or Marsh Thistle, is a perennial thistle species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polycantha palustris include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
